# NIST STEP interoperability fixture

`nist_ftc_11_asme1_rb.stp` is the geometry-only AP203 file for Fully-Toleranced
Test Case 11 from the NIST MBE PMI Validation and Conformance Testing Project.

- Source: <https://www.nist.gov/ctl/smart-connected-systems-division/smart-connected-manufacturing-systems-group/mbe-pmi-0>
- Distribution: `NIST-PMI-STEP-Files.zip`, `AP203 geometry only/`
- SHA-256: `0126eb3a146acba1751847b0050a3c3ff90b5f849298ccb7885d984827259557`
- Retrieved: 2026-07-12

NIST states that these test cases and STEP files may be used without
restriction and requests acknowledgement. The NIST logo is not included.

This fixture exercises real external entities absent from the generated corpus:
periodic circle edges, one-edge loops, inner face bounds, planes, cylindrical
and toroidal surfaces, presentation/product metadata, and a closed shell.
